detaileddescription.para: Macro to retrieve hardware information from devicetree for the boost converter. For boost converter devicetree specifies pin P0.21 as boost enable gpio with active high configuration.

simplesect.para: (c) 2023 AXO Track GmbH, Berlin. All rights reserved.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: See description in boost header file
